name: Technical Stand-Up
shortDescription: Safely stand while keeping base and distance from guard.

name: Bridge and Shrimp Escape
shortDescription: Core movement chain to create space from bottom positions.

name: Closed Guard Break (Knees)
shortDescription: Open closed guard using posture and knee wedge mechanics.

name: Scissor Sweep
shortDescription: Classic collar-and-sleeve sweep from closed guard.

name: Kimura from Closed Guard
shortDescription: Shoulder lock setup using hip angle and grip isolation.

name: Triangle Choke Basics
shortDescription: Break posture, angle out, and lock high triangle finish.

name: Knee Slide Pass
shortDescription: Pressure passing line through shin shield and half guard.

name: Side Control Hip Escape
shortDescription: Frame-and-shrimp sequence to recover guard.

name: Cross Collar Choke from Guard
shortDescription: Double collar grip choke with elbow draw and angle.

name: Americana from Side Control
shortDescription: Paintbrush shoulder lock with pinning pressure.

name: Arm Drag to Back Take
shortDescription: Use arm drag from seated guard to secure the back.

name: Double Under Pass
shortDescription: Stacking pass with shoulder pressure and angle finish.

name: Toreando Pass
shortDescription: Speed-based outside pass controlling both pant legs.

name: Ankle Pick to Single
shortDescription: Combine upper body snap with ankle pick entry.

name: De La Riva Off-Balance Sweep
shortDescription: Kazushi and hook angle to tilt and come up on top.

name: Baseball Bat Choke
shortDescription: Collar choke timing trap from top and bottom entries.

name: Bow and Arrow Choke
shortDescription: Back control collar choke with pant grip extension.

name: Leg Drag Pass
shortDescription: Drag and staple leg to bypass hip line and settle.

name: Lapel Guard Tilt Sweep
shortDescription: Control posture with lapel feed and tilt mechanic.

name: S-Mount Armbar
shortDescription: High mount isolation to S-mount armbar finish.
